nasb.text: But Jesus, conscious that His disciples grumbled at this, said to them, “Does this cause you to stumble?

esv.text: But Jesus, knowing in himself that his disciples were grumbling about this, said to them, “Do you take offense at this?

cnv.text: 耶穌心裡知道門徒為了這事議論紛紛，就對他們說：“這話使你們動搖嗎？

ccb.text: 耶稣知道门徒在议论，就说：“这话叫你们失去信心吗？

csbs.text: 耶稣自己里面知道他的门徒们为这话私下议论，就对他们说：“这话绊倒你们吗？
